sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطِّفْلُ يُريدُ أَنْ يَرَى صُوَرَ النُّجُومِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je htjelo vidjeti fotografije zvijezda.
sentences.translationEn: The child wanted to see photos of the stars.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ الْأَبُ تَطْبِيقَ الْفَضَاءِ عَلَى التَّابْلِيتِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je otvorio aplikaciju za svemir na tabletu.
sentences.translationEn: The father opened a space app on the tablet.

sentences.translation: Oboje su vidjeli zvijezde, planete i Mjesec.
sentences.translationEn: They both saw the stars, planets, and the moon together.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الطِّفْلُ: أُرِيدُ أَنْ أَرَى الْقَمَرَ يَوْمًا مَا.
sentences.translation: Dijete je reklo: Jednog dana želim vidjeti Mjesec.
sentences.translationEn: The child said: I want to see the moon someday.
